name: com.arsmi.gamehub
description: Everything a Unity WebGL game needs to talk to the Arsmi Games platform: the postMessage bridge, save data across the three published save modes, wallet, rewarded ads, achievements, leaderboards, and a WebGL build that cannot ship without the SDK in it.

samples.description: A small quiz that exercises every SDK call: all three save modes, a rewarded ad, wallet, achievements, leaderboards, and a live log of everything crossing the bridge. Import it, then open Scenes/ArsmiSdkDemo.
